items.name: Project Wizard
items.description: Multi-step guided project creation with auto-save, draft recovery, and duplicate detection

items.name: Revision Detection
items.description: Automatically detects existing projects and copies files from previous RFA revisions

items.name: Project Search & Analytics
items.description: Full-text search, filtering, and project statistics

items.name: Template Validation
items.description: Validates templates and manages selection based on National Account and Agent preferences

items.name: Document Generation
items.description: Automated Word document generation from templates with variable substitution

items.name: Spec Review
items.description: AI-powered specification analysis with file upload, review history, and knowledge base management

items.name: BOM Data Analysis
items.description: Smart BOM upload with auto-detection, device breakdown, startup cost calculations, and product family analysis

items.name: BOM QC Review
items.description: Building code compliance scoring, anomaly detection, and device capability analysis

items.name: Agency Dashboard
items.description: 8-tab dashboard with Overview, Projects, Contacts, Playbook, Email Templates, Analytics, Tasks, and Settings

items.name: Performance Dashboard
items.description: Real-time metrics for response times, memory usage, and system health

items.name: DAS General
items.description: Team member directory, training materials, and product information management

items.name: Workload Dashboard
items.description: Team capacity management, assignments, and Excel bidirectional sync

items.name: Agile Workqueue
items.description: Monitor and manage agile work queue items

items.name: SharePoint Upload
items.description: Hybrid upload via Microsoft Graph API and OneDrive sync folder

items.name: OneDrive Sync
items.description: Automatic detection of sync folders with status monitoring

items.name: MS Lists Integration
items.description: Workload management synchronized with Microsoft Lists

items.name: Power Automate
items.description: Excel synchronization via Power Automate flows for team collaboration

items.name: Monthly Analytics Reports
items.description: Interactive charts powered by Recharts

items.name: KPIs
items.description: Total Projects, Completed, RFA Value, DAS Revenue, Turnaround Time, On-Time Rate

items.name: Chart Types
items.description: Pie charts, bar charts, area charts for trends and distributions

items.name: Export Options
items.description: PDF export, print mode, and multi-dimensional filtering

items.name: Email Template Library
items.description: Create, manage, and organize email templates by category

items.name: Variable Substitution
items.description: Dynamic placeholders for personalized emails

items.name: Outlook Integration
items.description: Open emails directly in Outlook with pre-filled content

items.name: Batch Operations
items.description: Send to multiple recipients efficiently

items.name: DAS Drive Upload
items.description: Upload projects to network DAS Drive (Z:) with progress tracking

items.name: Ready for QC Workflow
items.description: Scan SharePoint folders for QC zip files, download and extract

items.name: ZIP Creation
items.description: Compress project folders with intelligent file filtering

items.name: File Watching
items.description: Real-time monitoring of shared directories for changes

items.name: Auto-Update
items.description: Automatic application updates via electron-updater

items.name: Crash Reporting
items.description: Error tracking with Sentry integration

items.name: Feature Flags
items.description: Gradual feature rollouts with percentage-based targeting

items.name: Smart Defaults
items.description: Intelligent form field suggestions based on user history

items.name: Migration Assistant
items.description: Seamless migration from legacy HTA version (v4.2.5)

items.name: Security Logging
items.description: Comprehensive audit trail for all file and security operations

items.name: Theme Support
items.description: Dark and light mode toggle
